iphone-frame.description: Default iPhone frame (rounded corners, no notch).

watch-frame.description: Apple Watch frame with crown and curved corners.

android-frame.description: Generic Android phone frame with hole-punch camera.

macos-safari-frame.description: macOS Safari window chrome (traffic lights + URL bar).

macbook-pro-16-2024-frame.description: MacBook Pro 16" (2024) with display notch and bottom curve.

vision-pro-frame.description: Apple Vision Pro spatial-canvas frame with frosted glass plate.

foldable-frame.description: Galaxy Fold-style foldable with toggleable open/closed state.

browser-chrome.description: Chrome browser chrome with tabs, URL bar, and traffic lights.

browser-safari.description: Safari browser chrome with centered URL/title and toolbar.

browser-arc.description: Arc browser layout with sidebar tabs and command bar.

terminal.description: Single-file HTML terminal simulator with prompt and basic commands.

vscode.description: VS Code mockup with file tree, tab bar, and editor surface.

cmdk-palette.description: Raycast/cmdk-style command palette with fuzzy filter and shortcuts.

kanban-board.description: Three-column Kanban board with draggable cards and tag chips.

toast.description: Sonner-style toast stack with success/info/error kinds and dismiss.

drawer.description: Vaul-style bottom-sheet drawer with backdrop and grab handle.

skeleton-set.description: Five skeleton variants (text-line, avatar, card, list-row, image).

empty-states.description: Five empty-state variants (search, mailbox, chart, kanban-zero, error).

stepper.description: Horizontal three-step progress indicator with active and done states.

file-tree.description: Collapsible file tree with chevron toggles and folder/file icons.

glassmorphism-bg.description: Frosted-glass card surface with backdrop-filter blur.

bento-grid-bg.description: CSS grid bento layout with rounded cells and span helpers.

animated-gradient-bg.description: Looping animated gradient via background-position keyframes.

neubrutalism-surface.description: Neubrutalist card/button surface with thick borders and chunky shadows.

slide-16-9-deck.description: Reveal.js 16:9 slide deck skeleton (CDN-hosted, no build).

landing-hero.description: Landing page hero with eyebrow chip, headline, sub, and dual CTAs.
